Video.title: Video Demonstration
Video.description: A field training video or troubleshooting clip.

description.description: Brief summary of the video content

url.description: URL to the video source (YouTube, Vimeo, or direct upload)

thumbnail.description: URL to the video thumbnail image

userId.description: ID of the user who added the video

userEmail.description: Email of the user who added the video

/videos/{videoId}.description: Collection of community and official training videos.
